raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assemblymember Marc Berman secured $500,000 for the City of Campbell to renovate City Hall to improve accessibility.",
    "The renovations are intended to meet Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) standards.",
    "Improvements to City Hall will benefit community members who depend on local government for critical services.",
    "The City Hall ADA facility improvement project aligns with the City of Campbell's Strategic Goals and Objectives.",
    "The project will include upgrades to public counters and accessibility improvements to better serve residents.",
    "The main entrance of City Hall consists of long sloping ramps that will be improved to meet current standards.",
    "The Council Chambers have existing accessibility issues with fixed seating and access to the Council Dias area.",
    "The project will remove fixed seating in the Council Chambers to provide better access to the Dias and related spaces."
  ]
}
```
